Planning
We work with you from start to finish with the philosophy that capturing a deep understanding of your vision up front ensures your happiness with the final product. During the planning process, we talk through functionality and purpose, and diligently examine your budget.
02
Construction
Harko has always adhered to an industry-leading level of professionalism. Trusted relationships with the area's best tradespeople and a hardworking team mean your project is completed in a timely, budget-sensitive, highly crafted fashion.

Quality Assurance
We pride ourselves on the highest-quality construction and remodeling results. When you work with Harko, you benefit from our extensive construction experience, discerning eye for quality, and knowledge of current building trends and timeless solutions.

Construction & Remodels

Our Focus

Harko is setting a new standard for luxury home construction in the Denver, Boulder and greater Front Range areas. Our long-established relationships with high-quality tradespeople and proactive approach take the stress out of home renovations while providing impressive results that exceed expectations. We manage mid- to large-level complex projects for the most discerning clientele — from home improvements such as bathrooms and kitchens to extensive structural changes, additions and home renovations.

Home Renovations

Our team is exclusively focused on the custom, luxury home market. From architectural design and engineering, to interior design finishes and everything in between. We project manage the entire process and only work with the most highly acclaimed professionals and artisans to bring your vision to reality.

Our team is exclusively focused on the custom, luxury home market. From architectural design and engineering, to interior design finishes and everything in between. Multi-family Properties

Harko specializes in the remodel and new construction of multi-family properties. Brad has built over 100 multi-family units in real estate markets such as Jefferson Park, Sunny Side, Proper Highlands and Rosedale (Harvard Gulch). We work with clients to customize each unit to fit tenant needs, or create a palette, functional floor plan and building aesthetic you can apply throughout the property.

About Harko

Refined Excellence

Harko is setting a new standard for luxury home construction in the Denver, Boulder and greater Front Range areas. Our long-established relationships with high-quality tradespeople and proactive approach take the stress out of home renovations while providing impressive results that exceed expectations. We manage mid- to large-level complex projects for the most discerning clientele — from home improvements such as bathrooms and kitchens to extensive structural changes, additions and home renovations. We believe in providing a high level of quality assurance, adhering to realistic schedules, and working within project budgets.

What we do
Development Construction Interior Design Residential Properties

Meet Our President
and Founder

Our President and Founder, Brad Teets, has been building custom luxury homes in Denver for more than 18 years. He began his construction career building custom homes with his father's building company Carter Custom Homes at the young age of 14. Through this experience, he gained a deep understanding of electrical work, framing, interior trim and tile installation and the importance of putting client needs and desires above all else — no exceptions.

After a positive and rewarding career working with his father, Brad branched off from the family building company to tackle the market creating his own mark and legacy. Brad's most notable competitive advantage within the industry is his well established relationships with his trades. He has known more than a few of his accountable tradesmen for up to 20 years.

Core values

Transparency
Harko clients enjoy transparency as they navigate their home remodel or new construction venture
Communication
Harko provides clients with an open line of two-way communication and unwavering customer support
Personalization
We approach every project with the type of personalized attention and partnership that have always set us apart

Testimonials

"It was a pleasure working together with Harko to build our dream luxury home. Brad and his team exceeded every expectation with their attention to detail and commitment to quality."
The Johnson Family
Homeowner — Cherry Creek

Jobs with Harko

At Harko, we aim to establish long-term relationships with the industry's top-level tradespeople. If you feel you would be a good fit, let us know. We're always looking for trusted, proven partners. From project managers to finish workers and everyone in between, if you're looking to join the Harko team, we look forward to hearing from you.

Falcon Hills Drive

Refined Excellence

A complete custom build in Denver's sought-after Falcon Hills neighborhood, featuring bespoke walnut cabinetry, marble-clad bathrooms, custom iron railings, and curated interior design throughout every room. This project showcases Harko's ability to deliver extraordinary craftsmanship at every level of detail.

Location
Falcon Hills, Denver
Building
Single-family Residence
Roles
Planning, Construction,
Interior & Exterior Design
01 / 10
4
Bedrooms
5
Bathrooms
5,200
Sq. Ft.

Project Specific Contribution

Harko managed all facets of this custom build — from foundation to finishing touches. Our team coordinated with architects, interior designers, and specialty tradespeople to bring this vision to life. Custom walnut cabinetry, marble-clad bathrooms, hand-forged iron railings, and curated lighting design were hallmarks of this project.

  • General Contracting & Project Management
  • Custom Cabinetry & Millwork
  • Interior & Exterior Design Coordination
  • Landscape Architecture

The living room captures natural light through floor-to-ceiling windows, complementing the warm walnut and stone palette throughout.

"It was a pleasure working together with Harko to build our dream luxury home. Brad and his team exceeded every expectation with their attention to detail and commitment to quality."

THE JOHNSON FAMILY — Homeowner, Falcon Hills
